body.title: Traversal context substrate — traversal_contexts table + cortex methods + tools module
body.result: traversal_contexts table + cortex methods + tools/traversal_context.py. Committed in batch.
body.description: Add traversal_contexts table (LOCAL SQLite, after traces). cortex methods: traversal_start(job_id)->context_id, traversal_get(ctx_id, key)->str|None, traversal_set(ctx_id, key, value). New tools/traversal_context.py: start_traversal(), ctx_get(ctx_id, key), ctx_set(ctx_id, key, value) — direct SQLite access via paths().instance/wild-0001.db. Registers 2 tools in registry. Seed script writes PROCEDURAL memory documenting TRAVERSAL_CTX_ID TWM convention. NOT touching main.py dispatch or basal_ganglia — storage substrate only. Prerequisite for T-os-primitives.
